name: sales operations team in a marketing agency processing 10-20 sales forecasts/month tool
description: For sales operations teams in marketing agencies processing 10-20 sales forecasts/month, inaccurate data causes misallocation of resources. We provide customized sales forecasts and performance dashboards instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
